--- graph_table_match_no_columns.sql
SELECT n.id FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph MATCH (n:Person)) AS g

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.ExprSelectItem{
        Expr: &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 7,
              NameEnd: 8,
              Name:    "n",
            },
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 9,
              NameEnd: 11,
              Name:    "id",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   12,
      Source: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
        GraphTable: 17,
        RParen:     55,
        GraphName:  &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 30,
              NameEnd: 38,
              Name:    "FinGraph",
            },
          },
        },
        Query: &ast.GraphTableMatch{
          Match: &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    39,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  45,
                          Rparen:  54,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 46,
                              NameEnd: 47,
                              Name:    "n",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 47,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 48,
                                  NameEnd: 54,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
        As: &ast.AsAlias{
          As:    57,
          Alias: &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 60,
            NameEnd: 61,
            Name:    "g",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT n.id FROM GRAPH_TABLE(FinGraph MATCH (n:Person)) AS g
